name: Off-Target Analyzer
description: Evaluates candidate gRNAs for off-target effects and returns the safest optimal guide alongside experiment metadata.

inputs.name: candidate_gRNAs
inputs.description: List of candidate gRNAs with baseline on-target scores.

inputs.name: organism
inputs.description: The target organism genome to evaluate against.

inputs.name: cas_variant
inputs.description: Pass-through: The Cas variant being used.

inputs.name: edit_type
inputs.description: Pass-through: The type of CRISPR edit.

inputs.name: kit_choice
inputs.description: Pass-through: The selected plasmid or kit.

inputs.name: cell_type
inputs.description: Pass-through: The target cell line or cell type (e.g., HEK293).

outputs.description: A JSON object containing the optimal guide sequence, the off-target risk profile, and all pass-through metadata required for the Construction File Builder.
